/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -fPIC -fvisibility=hidden -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -shared  -o libMemoryAccessPass.so CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/AnalysisDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/InterproceduralAnalysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/IRUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/MemoryAnalysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/MemoryAccessPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/PragmaParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MemoryAccessPass.dir/ReportPrinter.cpp.o
